name: Webhook Server + VAPI Config

webhook_server.description: Full Bun/TypeScript webhook server handling VAPI webhooks for career coaching

call_logger.description: Call logging utilities with CLI (health, analytics, escalations)

vapi_config.description: Reference VAPI assistant config (webhook is source of truth)

assessCareerStage.description: Processes 3 diagnostic question answers → primary_stage, secondary_concerns, pain_points, urgency, effort_level, calibration_needed

getCareerRecommendations.description: Returns stage-appropriate actions, timeframe, priority, urgency adjustments, pain point advice

explainCareerConcept.description: Resolves concept via concept-map.json → loads knowledge base file content. Handles files and directories.

requestCareerSession.description: Logs escalation to DuckDB, sends SMS to V, returns booking link

lookupCaller.description: Checks phone number against caller_lookup table (Fillout form submissions) and caller_insights (returning callers)

collectFeedback.description: Logs helpful, rating, feedback_text, would_recommend to feedback table

notes_for_downstream: D4.2 (VAPI dashboard config): Point webhook URL to the registered service, set X-Vapi-Secret header to CAREER_HOTLINE_SECRET value
V needs to create CAREER_HOTLINE_SECRET env var in Zo secrets before the service goes live
The caller_lookup table is empty — D4 should document how Fillout form submissions get loaded (manual or webhook)
concept-map.json is loaded from the build artifacts directory — if this moves, update the path in hotline-webhook.ts
